page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package to do gene-level meta-anlaysis of high-throughput functional genomics RNAi or CRISPR screening data. Both microarray and NGS data are supported
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package to do gene-level meta-anlaysis of high-throughput functional genomics RNAi or CRISPR screening data. Both microarray and NGS data are supported
